description_zh: 0-1岁健康小奶猫,精力充沛眼神好

expectations.rationale: kitten coat is fresh and clean
no urgent issues for a healthy kitten
no urgent flag for healthy kitten

qualitative_criteria_zh: 应该明确认识到这是小奶猫(年龄段),不要按成年猫标准评估
建议应该是 kitten 适合的(疫苗/玩耍/成长饮食),不是老猫的关节支持
不应该因为'年龄小'就刻意降低分数
qualitative_criteria_en: Should recognize this is a kitten and adapt rubric (not adult-cat standard)
Suggestions should be kitten-appropriate (vaccines, play, growth diet) not senior-cat
Should not drop scores for being young
